Usage: unity [options] [command]

CLI for Unity

Options:
  -V, --version         output the version number
  --format <format>     Output format [possible values: human, json, tsv, ndjson] (env: UNITY_FORMAT)
  -h, --help            display help for command

Commands:
  editors|e             Manage Unity editors
  install|i [version]   Install a Unity editor
  help [command]        display help for command
